rule CDB_OpenAM_has_preauth_Reflected_XSS_in_OAut {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for OpenAM has pre-auth Reflected XSS in OAuth2 / OIDC response_mode=form_post via s"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-06-22"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-INGEST" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "FormPostResponse" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-53779 - WebP Server Go < 0.15.0 Path Traversal via "; content:"CVE-2026-53779"; nocase; sid:6551638; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-11834 - Unauthenticated Command Injection via DHCP "; content:"CVE-2026-11834"; nocase; sid:6023887; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-54298 - Astro: XSS via Unescaped Attribute Names in"; content:"CVE-2026-54298"; nocase; sid:3176907; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-54293 - NLTK: URL-Encoded Path Traversal in nltk.da"; content:"CVE-2026-54293"; nocase; sid:7644167; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-11373: Net::Statsite::Client versions through 1.1.0"; content:"CVE-2026-11373"; nocase; sid:1116886; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)
